_meta.description: Internal gains section registered input nodes. These user-editable values define metabolic rate, plug load density, lighting density, and equipment gains. All are C-classified (model-specific) and feed into total internal gains, annual energy, and per-area intensity calculations.

instances.label: Occupant Metabolic Rate
instances.note: Metabolic heat gain per occupant. Typical: 60W (sleeping) to 120W (light office work) to 300W (heavy activity).

instances.label: Plug Load Density
instances.note: Electrical plug load density. Typical range: 2.5-15 W/m² depending on building type.

instances.label: Lighting Power Density
instances.note: Lighting power density. Code minimum varies by occupancy type (NBC Table 9.36.3.12).

instances.label: Equipment Internal Gains
instances.note: Additional equipment heat gains not captured in plug loads. Typically zero for residential.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput in InternalGainsNodes.js)
signature.output: Values stored in MultiModelState, consumed by internal gains computed nodes and section compliance ratios

preconditions.description: Plug load density cannot be negative

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of occupant total gains (h_64), per-area occupant gains (g_64), subtotal (h_69), annual energy (h_70)
behavior.note: C-classified, model-specific. Also triggers S09 compliance ratio (m_64)

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of plug load total (h_66), subtotal (h_69), annual energy (h_70)
behavior.note: C-classified. Also triggers S09 compliance ratio (m_66)

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of lighting total (h_67), subtotal (h_69), annual energy (h_70)
behavior.note: C-classified. Also triggers S09 compliance ratio (m_67)

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of equipment per-area (g_68), subtotal (h_69), annual energy (h_70)
behavior.note: C-classified. Also triggers S09 compliance ratio (m_68)

edgeCases.rationale: Valid for unoccupied or minimal-gain buildings

edgeCases.condition: Equipment total entered in W while plug loads in W/m²
edgeCases.handling: Equipment uses total watts (not density), per-area is computed as total/floorArea
edgeCases.rationale: Equipment may not scale linearly with floor area (e.g., a single elevator motor)

references.source: SectionComplianceNodes.js (consumes d_64, d_66, g_67, d_68 for S09 compliance ratios)
